context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the skill-router instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: When a task arrives, identify the matching skill from the tables below and **name it explicitly as the next skill to use** before responding further. Generated artifacts (YARD docs, Postman collections, READMEs) must be in **English** unless the user explicitly requests another language.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: When multiple skills could apply: TDD → Planning → Domain discovery → Process (refactor-code) → Domain implementation (rails-\*, ruby-\*). Use plan-tests when the first failing spec is not obvious.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: > **Match:** Vague request, no clear skill. Use fallback: load context first.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: > **Match:** Multi-concern changeset. Load context, then decompose into appropriate review skills.
